title: docs: document the v0.16.0 Redundancy Guard across every surface
context:
A doc-coverage audit found the guard was only in the changelog. Close the
gaps so every discovery surface reflects it:

- README: new "Redundancy Guard" entry in the Enforcement section
- DESIGN.md: added to the canonical guardrail enumeration
- site: feature card (/13) on the landing grid; a #redundancy section,
  sidebar link, meta, merge-verdict dimension, and CLI row in docs.html
- CLI/MCP help: `hunch check` description + the hunch_merge_verdict tool
  description now mention the advisory;  Touches invariant(s): con_e04226bd05 (The MCP server must stay client-agnostic: all assistants point to the same .hunch/ graph; no Claude-only behavior in the server).
decision: Changed code in src/cli, src/mcp (2 file(s)).
